Design and publish in one place

Design freely

Skip Figma imports and start designing directly in Framer. Design Pages let you explore freely like Figma’s design canvas.

Move to Web Pages

Promote your designs to Web Pages. Continue to tweak, add breakpoints, animations, interactions. Then? Just publish.

Learn more

Go beyond websites

Not every project is a page. Use Framer for icons, visuals, and social assets—all in one place.

Learn more

Free and no limits

Designing in Framer is completely free. Unlimited projects, unlimited pages, and unlimited editors. You only pay when you launch your site on a custom domain.

Learn more
